title: collomia tenella
intro: Collomia tenella, also known as the delicate collomia, is a perennial wildflower that belongs to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). The plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Collomia tenella include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive problems. Collomia tenella can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the dried flowers in hot water or as a tincture by mixing the plant's extract with a carrier oil.
